// M.g.cs
// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable
partial class M
{
    public static global::CatDto Map(global::Cat src)
    {
        global::System.ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(src);
        var __dst = new global::CatDto(
            Name: src.Name
        );
        return __dst;
    }
    public static global::AnimalDto Map(global::Animal src)
    {
        global::System.ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(src);
        return src switch
        {
            global::Cat __0 => Map(__0),
            _ => throw new global::System.InvalidOperationException("No polymorphic mapping for runtime type " + src.GetType().FullName)
        };
    }
}
